column1: # DERIVED arena graces: distance(grace spawn, nearest boss enemy spawn) < 40.0m
# A region lock force-lights every grace in its region so you can warp in. A grace INSIDE a
# boss arena must never be force-lit -- warping there drops you on a live boss.
# sources: EMEVD DisplayBossHealthBar + witchy'd MSB Part/Enemy <EntityID>/<Position>
# MSBs live in TWO dirs and they are NOT the same set: elden_ring_artifacts/map is COMPLETE
# (1347 unpacked); mapstudio/ is PARTIAL (1034). The tool searches map/ first.
# ADJUDICATED: 108 of 118 boss maps. The other 7 have boss entities that are NOT MSB
# Parts at all (script-spawned), so they can never be adjudicated by this method -- the hand
# lists in gen_data stay LOAD-BEARING for graces on those tiles. Listed below so gen_data can
# tell 'derivation says safe' apart from 'derivation could not look'.
